title: W's Shulker Forretress
body:
**There are many packs like it, but this one is mine.**

## W's Shulker Forretress
W's Shulker Forretress is a faithful adaptation of the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod's shulker Forretress form which was removed in 1.7.0. These readded Shulker Forretress can be obtained in multiple ways:
- natural spawns in End Cities
- evolve a Pineco while holding a Shulker Shell
- give a Forretress a Shulker shell in it's cosmetic slot
Naturally spawned Shulker Forretress, on top of their regular counterparts' loot pool, will drop `0-1` Shulker Shells on defeat.

Future updates (no promises)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) compatibility
- Option to revert Shulker Forretress to normal Forretress via cosmetic slot

## Important Notes:
**This pack needs to be put in both your resource pack and data pack folders to function properly.**
**Since resource packs and data packs do not share pack formatting, the data pack will show up as "Made for an older version of Minecraft" - It will work fine!**
**Thank you to the much smarter people on the [Cobblemon Discord](https://discord.gg/cobblemon) who helped me develop this. Credits can be found in `credits.txt`.**
